contributor_note: Seeded from common horticultural knowledge. Needs primary source verification.

habit.note: Spreads aggressively by underground runners — container is essential outdoors.

notes: Young shoots edible — rich in iron and vitamins. Sting disappears when cooked or dried. Classic in Scandinavian and British cuisine. Spreads aggressively — container only outdoors. Harvest before flowering for best flavour.
